calendar.matters:
For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition 1. To Compel Trustee Richard D Bacigalupi To Report Information And Account To Beneficiary 2. To Compel Trustee Richard D Bacigalupi To Administer The Trust According To Trust Instrument 3. For Damages For Breach Of Trust By Trustee Richard D Bacigalupi
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for and with Renald Bacigalupi. Edward Thirkell for Richard Bacigalupi (Trustee).

Mr. Bassi stated that mediation was held but was not successful and recommended the Court set the matter for trial. Mr. Thirkell concurred with a time estimate of three to four days for trial. The Court referred the matter to the department of the Presiding Judge for trial setting (Court to sign order; clerk to notify counsel when the order is signed).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Accounting By Mr. Thirkell And The Issue Of Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motin For Order Compelling Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Nov-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents is granted in part and denied in part.
The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory 15.1. The interrogatory is properly directed to the denial of material allegations.
The motion is granted as it seeks a privilege log. Any response which asserts privilege must identify documents withheld with specificity. That description is in fact what is known as a 'privilege log.' As the responses refer to documents previously produced, those documents must be identified with particularity.
The motion is granted as to Request For Production Of Documents Numbers 1 and 60 of the First Set as those requests are directed to the trustee and relate to the trust property, though not to the individual's personal holdings.
The motion is denied as to Request For Production Of Documents Numbers 1 and 3 of the Second Set as they are overly broad. Any request must be limited to the trust and shall not include the assets of trustee as an individual.
The motion is granted as to Request For Production Of Documents Numbers 94 and 96.
The motion is denied as to Request For Production Of Documents of third set Numbers 101-103 as they invade the tax privileges of a third party.
Further responses and the privilege log shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Accounting By Mr. Thirkell And The Issue Of Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Continued To Dec-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition 1. To Compel Trustee Richard D Bacigalupi To Report Information And Account To Beneficiary 2. To Compel Trustee Richard D Bacigalupi To Administer The Trust According To Trust Instrument 3. For Damages For Breach Of Trust By Trustee Richard D Bacigalupi
Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Continued To Dec-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for Renald Bacigalupi (also present). Ed Thirkell for Richard Bacigalupi (also present).

The parties stated that the accounting had not been filed, that they were attempting to settle the matter and that they would be participating in mediation. In addition, they reported that the only remaining issue was with regard to the appraisal of the property. The matter was continued to December 15, 2008.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Directing Compliance With Subpoena Duces Tecum And For Expenses Of The Motion
Off Calendar Aug-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Edward De la Torre, defendant appearing in Propria Persona; no other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Petitioner's Motion For Order Directing Compliance With Subpoena Duces Tecum is moot as the witness has complied with the subpoena. Sanctions are denied as the proof of service does not show that personal service of the motion was made as required by C.R.C. 3.1025. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Petition 1. To Compel Trustee Richard D Bacigalupi To Report Information And Account To Beneficiary 2. To Compel Trustee Richard D Bacigalupi To Administer The Trust According To Trust Instrument 3. For Damages For Breach Of Trust By Trustee Richard D Bacigalupi
Off Calendar Jul-07-2008 Continued To Oct-20-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Thirkell for and with Richard Bacigalupi (Trustee). Michael Bassi for and with Renald Bacigalupi (Petitioner).

Mr. Bassi stated that they had been talking about methods to resolve the case and that they agreed that Mr. Thirkell would provide an accounting within 60 days and meet to try to resolve the issues on how to distribute. He also stated that there would be a complex tax issue if sold. Mr. Thirkell stated that the current years accounting (06/26/07 through 06/30/08) would be filed no later than September 8, 2008 and requested the status conference be set for 30 days later. Status is set for October 20, 2008. The matter was also continued to October 20, 2008.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition For Declaratory Relief To Determine Whether Proposed Petition Is A Contest Within Terms Of No Contest Clause
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order
